programme.title: Country Strong
programme.desc: Personal demons, complicated romantic entanglements and the demands of fame threaten to derail the comeback tour of a country-music superstar (Gwyneth Paltrow). Starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Tim McGraw, Garrett Hedlund.

programme.title: Armageddon Time
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about the strength of family and the generational pursuit of the American dream. Starring Anne Hathaway, Jeremy Strong, Michael Banks Repeta.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: The immortal Louis tells of his life as a vampire recruited by Lestat in 1791 Louisiana. Starring Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Antonio Banderas.

programme.title: Gaslit
programme.desc: Martha finally speaks out, putting a strain on her marriage; the FBI comes closer to an answer on the real story behind Watergate and John Dean is forced to come clean to Mo on their Camp David honeymoon.

programme.title: Gaslit
programme.desc: Frank Wills, the security guard who lost his job at the Watergate over the break-in, struggles with his newfound fame.

programme.title: Laurence Anyways
programme.desc: In the 90s, Laurence tells his girlfriend, Fred, that he wants to become a woman; they confront the prejudices of their friends, ignore the council of their families and brave the phobias of the society they offend. Starring Melvil Poupaud, Suzanne Clement, Nathalie Baye.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The new Abnormal Homeland is in danger, forcing Helen Magnus into a corner; she has a plan that no one would suspect.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus recruits a forensic psychiatrist to join her in a quest to track, study and protect the creatures that secretly populate the world.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Pippi Longstocking
programme.desc: Reckless Pippi (Tami Erin) makes friends, walks on walls, spins fast and thwarts a wicked schoolmarm (Eileen Brennan). Starring Tami Erin, Eileen Brennan, Dennis Dugan.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A young man inadvertently breaks three important rules concerning his new pet and unleashes a horde of malevolently mischievous monsters on a small town. Starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, Hoyt Axton.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: Indian Horse
programme.desc: A Canadian First Nations boy survives in a residential school in the 1970s. Starring Sladen Peltier, Forrest Goodluck, Ajuawak Kapashesit.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters peoples dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someones subconscious. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page.

programme.title: City of Angels
programme.desc: An angel (Nicolas Cage) considers becoming human after falling in love with a Los Angeles heart surgeon (Meg Ryan). Starring Nicolas Cage, Meg Ryan, Andre Braugher.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: As the oath-taking ceremony to determine who will be Laird of Clan MacKenzie approaches, Ellen hatches a new plan to protect herself and her family; Julia is forced to make an impossible choice.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip detectives protect a witness to a murder while investigating a case of stolen heroin from the evidence storage room from their police precinct. Starring Martin Lawrence, Will Smith, Tea Leoni.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Two detectives uncover a conspiracy involving a drug kingpin while trying to stop the trafficking of Ecstasy in Miami. Starring Martin Lawrence, Will Smith, Jordi Mollà.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Fugitive Pieces
programme.desc: A writer (Stephen Dillane) has trouble moving past his haunting memories of the Holocaust. Starring Stephen Dillane, Rade Serbedzija, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of GaHoole
programme.desc: A kidnapped owlet breaks away from his captors and, with his new companions, sets out to find a band of mythic warriors to defend his race from the evil Pure Ones. Starring Jim Sturgess, Emily Barclay, Ryan Kwanten.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: In 19th-century Europe, a gifted pianist (Johnny Depp) mistakenly weds a dead woman (Helena Bonham Carter) who takes him to the underworld. Starring Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: A high-school student is caught up in a romance with a vampire, whose family has renounced the drinking of blood. Starring Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Billy Burke.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bellas loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires. Starring Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Bella must choose between Edward and Jacob amid a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampires quest for revenge. Starring Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: A chain of events, set off by Edward and Bellas marriage, honeymoon and birth of a child, yields a shocking development for Jacob. Starring Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella and Edward gather werewolves, vampires and other allies to help them protect their daughter from the Volturi. Starring Kristen Stewart, Robert Pattinson, Taylor Lautner.

programme.title: Murder at the Embassy
programme.desc: When a private detective is called to investigate a suspicious murder inside Cairos seemingly impenetrable British Embassy, she discovers a second crime has been committed that could spark war across the globe. Starring Mischa Barton, Mido Hamada, Kojo Attah.

programme.title: The Ravenous
programme.desc: A village in Quebec is terrorized by a flesh-eating plague. Starring Marc-Andre Grondin, Monia Chokri, Charlotte St-Martin.

programme.title: Mommy
programme.desc: A peculiar neighbor (Suzanne Clement) offers hope to a recent widow (Anne Dorval) who is struggling to raise a teenager (Antoine-Olivier Pilon) who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent. Starring Anne Dorval, Antoine Olivier Pilon, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: Ready or Not
programme.desc: Grace couldnt be happier after she marries the man of her dreams at his familys luxurious estate. Theres just one catch -- she must now hide from midnight until dawn while her new in-laws hunt her down with guns, crossbows and other weapons. Starring Samara Weaving, Adam Brody, Mark OBrien.

programme.title: Ticket to Paradise
programme.desc: A man and his ex-wife race to Bali, Indonesia, to stop their daughter from marrying a seaweed farmer. As they desperately try to sabotage the wedding, the bickering duo soon find themselves rekindling old feelings that once made them happy together. Starring George Clooney, Julia Roberts, Kaitlyn Dever.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world. Starring Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla, King of the Monsters, arises to combat massive, malevolent foes that have been feeding on a nuclear plants reactors and now threaten mankind with total annihilation. Starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ken Watanabe, Elizabeth Olsen.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: A resourceful teen takes her younger sisters place in a brutal contest in which youths from each of 12 districts fight to the death on live television. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After their unprecedented victory in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark embark on a Victors Tour. Katniss senses rebellion is stirring, but a cruel change in the upcoming 75th Hunger Games may change Panem forever. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After shattering the games forever, Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) finds herself in District 13, fighting to save Peeta (Josh Hutcherson) and a nation moved by her courage. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: Katniss faces mortal traps, deadly enemies and moral choices when she and her closest friends leave District 13 to assassinate President Snow and liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: As the oath-taking ceremony to determine who will be Laird of Clan MacKenzie approaches, Ellen hatches a new plan to protect herself and her family; Julia is forced to make an impossible choice.

Spartas King Leonidas (Gerard Butler) and his badly outnumbered warriors fight to the death against King Xerxes massive Persian army at the Battle of Thermopylae. Starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, David Wenham.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, driven by vengeance for his fathers death, leads an army against Greece; Greek city-states join forces under Athens command to fight Artemisia in a naval battle. Starring Sullivan Stapleton, Eva Green, Lena Headey.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: To evade gangsters, two men (Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon) don skirts and makeup and join an all-girl band with a sizzling singer (Marilyn Monroe). Starring Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon, Marilyn Monroe.

programme.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
programme.desc: Tennessee Williams Blanche DuBois (Vivien Leigh) moves in with her sister, Stella (Kim Hunter), and brutish brother-in-law, Stanley Kowalski (Marlon Brando). Starring Marlon Brando, Vivien Leigh, Kim Hunter.

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. wages a historic -- but dangerous -- battle to secure voting rights for all, culminating in an epic march in Alabama from Selma to Montgomery. Starring David Oyelowo, Tom Wilkinson, Carmen Ejogo.

programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Gregory Peck) with two bright children (Mary Badham, Phillip Alford) defends a black man falsely accused of raping a white woman in 1930s Alabama. Starring Gregory Peck, Mary Badham, Phillip Alford.

programme.title: Jezebel
programme.desc: A New Orleans belle (Bette Davis) uses another man (George Brent) to make her fiance (Henry Fonda) jealous. Starring Bette Davis, Henry Fonda, George Brent.

programme.title: The Great Santini
programme.desc: A teenager stands up to his father, a gung-ho peacetime Marine pilot who runs his family like boot camp. Starring Robert Duvall, Blythe Danner, Michael OKeefe.

programme.title: Min and Bill
programme.desc: A fisherman (Wallace Beery) loves an innkeeper (Marie Dressler) who loves a girl (Dorothy Jordan) like a daughter. Starring Marie Dressler, Wallace Beery, Dorothy Jordan.

programme.title: Outcast Lady
programme.desc: A young woman risks her own well-being to help her alcoholic brother. Starring Constance Bennett, Herbert Marshall, Elizabeth Allan.

programme.title: Beneath the 12-Mile Reef
programme.desc: A Greek sponge diver (Robert Wagner) in Florida loves the daughter (Terry Moore) of a rival family of Key West sponge hookers. Starring Robert Wagner, Terry Moore, Gilbert Roland.

programme.title: Woman in the Dunes
programme.desc: A Japanese entomologist (Eiji Okada) is imprisoned with a woman (Kyôko Kishida) at the bottom of a sandpit. Starring Eiji Okada, Kyôko Kishida, Kôji Mitsui.

programme.title: Mystery Street
programme.desc: A Harvard doctors (Bruce Bennett) study of a female skeleton leads a Boston police detective (Ricardo Montalban) to a killer. Starring Ricardo Montalban, Sally Forrest, Bruce Bennett.

programme.title: Summer of 42
programme.desc: A teen (Gary Grimes) falls in love with a lonely young woman (Jennifer ONeill) and hopes to take the place of her husband who is away at war. Starring Gary Grimes, Jennifer ONeill, Jerry Houser.

programme.title: The Sandpiper
programme.desc: A free-spirited artist (Elizabeth Taylor), who lives near Californias Big Sur, meets the administrator (Richard Burton) of the parochial school that her young son attends and lures the cleric away from his wife (Eva Marie Saint). Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Richard Burton, Eva Marie Saint.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees "Shoeless" Joe Jacksons ghost and other marvels. Starring Kevin Costner, Amy Madigan, James Earl Jones.

programme.title: Bull Durham
programme.desc: A literary baseball groupie (Susan Sarandon) romances a pitcher (Tim Robbins) and a catcher (Kevin Costner) on a minor-league North Carolina team. Starring Kevin Costner, Susan Sarandon, Tim Robbins.

programme.title: Bang the Drum Slowly
programme.desc: A top major-league pitcher (Michael Moriarty) devotes himself to a simple-minded catcher (Robert De Niro) dying of Hodgkins disease. Starring Robert De Niro, Michael Moriarty, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: The Pride of the Yankees
programme.desc: Lou Gehrig (Gary Cooper) leads the New York baseball team for years and then, slowly dying, retires with a stadium farewell. Starring Gary Cooper, Teresa Wright, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: The Stratton Story
programme.desc: Inspired by his wife (June Allyson) and son, Chicago White Soxer Monty Stratton (James Stewart) pitches with an artificial leg. Starring James Stewart, June Allyson, Frank Morgan.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkels regime. Starring Charlie Chaplin, Paulette Goddard, Jack Oakie.

programme.title: A Day at the Races
programme.desc: Doctor Hugo Hackenbush (Groucho Marx), Tony (Chico Marx), and Stuffy (Harpo Marx) upset a sanitorium, orchestra pit, water carnival and steeplechase. Starring Groucho Marx, Chico Marx, Harpo Marx.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A newsman (Clark Gable) rides a bus and shares a cabin with a tycoons (Walter Connolly) runaway daughter (Claudette Colbert). Starring Claudette Colbert, Clark Gable, Walter Connolly.

programme.title: Annie Hall
programme.desc: A New York comedian (Woody Allen) recalls his lost love, a kooky singer (Diane Keaton) with a style all her own. Starring Woody Allen, Diane Keaton, Tony Roberts.

programme.title: Lover Come Back
programme.desc: An adman (Rock Hudson) and an adwoman (Doris Day) fight over a dummy account and wind up in bed together. Starring Rock Hudson, Doris Day, Tony Randall.

programme.title: The Producers
programme.desc: A Broadway producer (Zero Mostel) and his accountant (Gene Wilder) back a sure-fire flop: "Springtime for Hitler." Starring Zero Mostel, Gene Wilder, Dick Shawn.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: A TV cameraman hurt while covering a football game is told by his brother-in-law how to get a big insurance settlement. Starring Jack Lemmon, Walter Matthau, Ron Rich.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning tale of a temperamental actor who becomes a sensation while posing as a woman on a hit TV soap opera. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange, Teri Garr.

programme.title: My Man Godfrey
programme.desc: Socialite Irene Bullock needs a forgotten man to win a scavenger hunt and finds Godfrey Park, who resides in a dump by the East River. She hires him as a butler, to the chagrin of her spoiled sister Cornelia, who seeks to get Godfrey fired. Starring William Powell, Carole Lombard, Alice Brady.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: A snooty socialite (Katharine Hepburn) fights with her ex-husband (Cary Grant) and flirts with a reporter (James Stewart). Starring Cary Grant, Katharine Hepburn, James Stewart.

programme.title: Monsieur Hulots Holiday
programme.desc: A hapless French tourist attempts to make the most of his disastrous vacation as he causes havoc at a seaside resort hotel. Starring Jacques Tati, Louis Perrault, Nathalie Pascaud.
A middle-aged pop-music composer (Dudley Moore) follows a nubile woman (Bo Derek) on her honeymoon to Puerto Vallarta. Starring Dudley Moore, Bo Derek, Julie Andrews.

programme.title: Its a Great Feeling
programme.desc: Gary Cooper, Errol Flynn, Ronald Reagan, Joan Crawford and a waitress (Doris Day) join two comedians (Dennis Morgan, Jack Carson) making a movie. Starring Doris Day, Bill Goodwin, Irving Bacon.

programme.title: What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?
programme.desc: A Hollywood child-star has-been (Bette Davis) torments her famous sister (Joan Crawford), now in a wheelchair. Starring Bette Davis, Joan Crawford, Victor Buono.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: A silent-film star (Gene Kelly) loves a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds) who dubs his squeaky-voiced co-star in a 1927 Hollywood talkie. Starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: A Hollywood star (James Mason) drinks away his career, as his singer wife (Judy Garland) becomes famous. Starring Judy Garland, James Mason, Jack Carson.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard
programme.desc: Hack screenwriter Joe Gillis moves in with Hollywood has-been Norma Desmond and her devoted chauffeur, Max Von Mayerling. Starring William Holden, Gloria Swanson, Erich von Stroheim.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Flashbacks at a funeral reveal how a Madrid nightclub dancer was propelled to instant stardom and eventual misfortune. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Ava Gardner, Edmond OBrien.

programme.title: The Oscar
programme.desc: As an Oscar nominee (Stephen Boyd) for best actor sits in the theater, his life as a Hollywood heel unfolds. Starring Stephen Boyd, Elke Sommer, Milton Berle.

programme.title: The Bad and the Beautiful
programme.desc: A ruthless producer (Kirk Douglas) uses and discards Hollywood hopefuls as stepping stones to the top of the Tinseltown heap. Starring Lana Turner, Kirk Douglas, Walter Pidgeon.

programme.title: Inside Daisy Clover
programme.desc: An overnight starlet (Natalie Wood) marries a homosexual actor (Robert Redford) and goes downhill in 1930s Hollywood. Starring Natalie Wood, Robert Redford, Christopher Plummer.

programme.title: The Player
programme.desc: About 65 real-life movie stars fringe the satire of a Hollywood studio executive (Tim Robbins) who gets away with murder. Starring Tim Robbins, Greta Scacchi, Fred Ward.

programme.title: Coco Chanel: Unbuttoned
programme.desc: Told in her own words and by the people who knew her; capturing the truth of the enigmatic Coco Chanel and reveals how her life inspired her famous designs.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Daddy
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) reluctantly allows Romeo (Merlin Santana) to move in while finishing out his senior year of high school.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Me, Me and Miss Jones
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo (Steve Harvey, Merlin Santana) become rivals for the affections of a 25-year-old swimsuit model.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - No Free Samples
programme.desc: Rap artist Lil Bow Wow (guest starring as himself) wants to sample an old hit of Steves (Steve Harvey) group, the Hi-Tops. Jermaine Dupri and Ron Isley also guest star.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Mother and Child Reunion
programme.desc: Romeos mother shows up and announces that she is leaving her husband to start a new life in Chicago.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Get Out
programme.desc: Michael tries to get his always-tardy family dressed and out the door to a wedding within just 15 minutes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Road Trip
programme.desc: A family trip to Paul Reveres house tests everyones nerves.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Girlhood 101
programme.desc: Celebrate all aspects of girlhood from school to friendships.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Meet the Grandparents
programme.desc: Wandas parents take over the household during their visit.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - For a Few Dollars More
programme.desc: Bernie bribes kids to attend Jordans birthday bash instead of another kids party that is slated for the same day.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Living My Truth
programme.desc: Live ones truth in ones words and actions.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Oxtail and Sweet Potato
programme.desc: Jimmie Jackson of Jimmie Jerk Chicken faces off against Adaya Nijay of Atlanta Vegan Breakfast; the challenge is to turn oxtails and sweet potatoes into a delicious pairing.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Wings and Cabbage
programme.desc: Hanashi Weathers, AKA Da Rib Lady, competes against Lawrence McIntosh of Mo Betta Barbecue; they must tackle making delectable dishes featuring southern staples: wings and cabbage.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Burger and Potato
programme.desc: Jay Craddick from Twisted Dish grills it up against Amanda Kinsey-Joplin of Amandas BarBeeQue; the menu includes backyard barbecue staples like burgers and potatoes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Brisket and Beans
programme.desc: Steve Morales of Smokey Steves BBQ competes with Markie Darling of Daddys Girl BBQ; the pitmasters are challenged with creating smoky and savory dishes featuring brisket and beans.

programme.title: Between Sisters
programme.desc: A bride and her sister set out to find their newly discovered siblings in order to invite them to the wedding.

programme.title: Steps of Faith
programme.desc: Mocked by her family for opening a hippotherapy farm for children, Faith questions her message from God after a child is nearly injured and the work is overwhelming.

programme.title: Family Time - Troop Dad
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to host a baby shower but she finds herself overcome with shower plans; Tony is asked to take over as Ebonys troop leader.

programme.title: Family Time - Air RNB
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa decide to turn their bedrooms into an AIR RNB but some issues arise.

programme.title: Family Time - Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Ebony works on a school project to plot out her family tree; Lisa is getting older and refuses to admit that she needs glasses.

programme.title: Family Time - Bright Lights, Big Dusty House
programme.desc: Tonys mother comes over to help out now that Lisa has started a full time job; Donnie convinces tony to shoot an ad for his business.

programme.title: Family Time - What Happens After Vegas
programme.desc: Lisa is upset that she and Tony didnt renew their vows while in Las Vegas; Tony tries to plan a small ceremony at home, but things quickly fall apart.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Chess Wars
programme.desc: Bernies kids all want something from him, but he manages to stay one step ahead of them by adhering to the principles of chess.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Incredible Bulk
programme.desc: Bernie starts buying everything in bulk, including junk food; Wanda locks up the junk food in a shed.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Maid Man
programme.desc: Bernie urges the new maid (guest star Theresa Saldana) to treat the children as if they were her own.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nut Job
programme.desc: Bernie enrolls the children in a myriad of activities, then discovers his Saturdays are at stake.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Other Sister
programme.desc: Bernies sister wants to help raise her niece and nephew but squabbles with her brother over parenting methods.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Player, Interrupted
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) books Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) as performers at a charity event held in a mental hospital.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Best Piggys Wedding
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) attempts to win Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) back when he hears she is planning to elope.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love, Death and Basketball
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) consoles Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) when she returns from her honeymoon without the groom.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Touched by a Pig
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) comforts a grieving Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson); Cedrics Grandma Puddin (Cedric The Entertainer) turns a beloved pet into soul food.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Pie
programme.desc: Steve makes scandalous deathbed confessions to Cedric and Regina when he thinks he is having a heart attack.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - A Star Is Born Again
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) converts the members of Steves (Steve Harvey) new girl band to feminism and they refuse to perform.

programme.title: And Then There Was You
programme.desc: Natalie picks up the pieces of her life after her husband leaves and falls in love with a man with secrets.

programme.title: In the Meantime
programme.desc: Soon to be married, a bride (Kali Hawk) finds that her friendship with a fellow volunteer (Darrin Dewitt Henson) at an adult-literacy program is developing into something much more intense.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: Jordan tries out for the basketball team, but the coach decides he is better suited for gymnastics as a ribbon dancer.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Love Thy Nephew
programme.desc: When a litigious neighbor asks Bernie to tear down the treehouse he built for Jordan, it leads to an all-night standoff.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Jackson State University
programme.desc: The Jackson State University band, the Sonic Boom of the South; band directors discuss a paramilitary structure within HBCU bands; the leaders of the Jackson 5 Drum Major Squad and the Prancing J-Settes dance line.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Alcorn State University
programme.desc: A tribute to the distinctive and fascinating culture of Black marching bands - The Halftime Show.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street (2012)
programme.desc: Two cops (Jonah Hill, Channing Tatum) must confront their teenage angst all over again when they go under cover as high-school students.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street (2014)
programme.desc: Officers Jenko and Schmidt begin to question their partnership after each infiltrates different cliques while undercover at a local college.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Timeline (2003)
programme.desc: Adventurers (Paul Walker, Frances OConnor, Gerard Butler) travel back to 14th-century France to save a professor caught in the middle of a war.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone (2007)
programme.desc: Two private investigators (Casey Affleck, Michelle Monaghan) tread dangerous ground as they scour the Boston underworld for a kidnapped child.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Twisted (2004)
programme.desc: With help from her partner (Andy Garcia), a police inspector (Ashley Judd) searches for a killer who is murdering her former lovers.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part 2 (1981)
programme.desc: Mrs. Voorhees son Jason is waiting when another load of teens (Amy Steel, John Furey, Adrienne King) tries to make a buck at Camp Crystal.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III (1982)
programme.desc: Killer Jason terrorizes teens (Dana Kimmell, Paul Kratka, Tracie Savage) and a biker gang.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part IV: The Final Chapter (1984)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th Part IV: The Final Chapter (1984)
programme.desc: Hockey-masked Jason goes after another batch of teens (Kimberly Beck, Peter Barton, Corey Feldman) at Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part V: A New Beginning (1985)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th Part V: A New Beginning (1985)
programme.desc: Teens (Melanie Kinnaman, Shavar Ross) flee and use a chain saw against someone wearing slasher Jasons hockey mask.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II (1974)
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) rules his fathers criminal empire, while flashbacks recall young Vitos (Robert De Niro) climb to power.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bears territory.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals (2016)
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A familys life in small-town Maine is shattered by the evil unleashed from an ancient American Indian burial ground.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail (2020)
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film theyre shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: Killer gorillas menace an ex-CIA agent (Laura Linney), a primatologist (Dylan Walsh) and others on a mission in Africa.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Shadow Land (2024)
programme.desc: Haunted by dreams of an assassination plot, a former American president uncovers a conspiracy to discredit his legacy. With help from his trusted adviser, they embark on a dangerous mission that could expose a global crisis.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: Heist 88 (2023)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Becoming Jane (2007)
programme.desc: Though her parents expect her to marry a wealthy suitor, young Jane Austen (Anne Hathaway) becomes involved with a penniless lawyer (James McAvoy) who inspires her future writings.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Doubt (2008)
programme.desc: Suspicions of child abuse fuel a traditionalist nuns (Meryl Streep) personal crusade against a popular priest (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who wants to reform her schools strict customs.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: The House of Yes (1997)
programme.desc: A man (Josh Hamilton) and his fiancee (Tori Spelling) visit his warped clan, complete with dark mansion and incestuous twin sister (Parker Posey).

programme.title: The House of Yes (1997)
programme.desc: A man (Josh Hamilton) and his fiancee (Tori Spelling) visit his warped clan, complete with dark mansion and incestuous twin sister (Parker Posey).

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (2002)
programme.desc: Chuck Barris produces game shows for television and leads a double life as a CIA assassin.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Runaway Bride (1999)
programme.desc: A New York reporter (Richard Gere) travels to Maryland to profile a woman (Julia Roberts) who left three bridegrooms at the altar.

programme.title: The Good Liar (2019)
programme.desc: Career con artist Roy Courtnay walks a treacherous tightrope as he hatches a scheme to swindle a well-to-do widow.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: Pixie sets out to avenge her mothers death and attempts a heist that will give her the means to leave her small-town life behind. When the plan goes horribly wrong, shes forced to team up with a pair of misfits who are clearly in over their heads.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)
programme.sub-title: Win a Date With Tad Hamilton! (2004)

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)

programme.title: The Queen (2006)

programme.title: Spencer (2021)
